failure_reason: Proved Form-native mutation response projection from live application graph rows. application-graph-response-projection.fk emits IdeaWithScore and SpecRegistryEntry-shaped JSON with scoring, ROI, vectors, and row parsing without FastAPI service calls. The sibling-kernel band returned 111 across Go/Rust/TypeScript, and application-graph-response-projection-test.sh returned verdict 111111 against a throwaway Postgres after Form-native graph writes and pg_query readback. Ordinary public mutation traffic remains on FastAPI until cache/side-effect proof, contributor-key audit proof, and a reversible public flip gate are complete.
